summary: Malformed Codex and LM Studio chat TOML now degrades discovery metadata to warnings and fallback defaults.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/chatProviders.test.ts --test-name "providers route degrades malformed Codex chat defaults to warnings instead of failing discovery"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted server wrapper proved /chat/providers now degrades malformed Codex chat TOML instead of failing discovery.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/chatModels.codex.test.ts --test-name "lmstudio models route degrades malformed chat defaults to warnings instead of failing discovery"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted server wrapper proved /chat/models?provider=lmstudio now returns warnings and seeded Agent Flag defaults for malformed chat TOML.
